name: burger-plus-web
description: Burger Plus — musteri ve personel uygulamalari tek catida (Vercel)

scripts.install:all: cd apps/musteri && npm install && cd ../personel && npm install
scripts.build:musteri: cd apps/musteri && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:personel: cd apps/personel && npm install && VITE_BASE=/personel/ npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:musteri && npm run build:personel && node birlestir.js
